ar.description:
الشروط و الأحكام :

• بطاقة فزعة سارية المفعول

• هذا العرض يسري على حامل البطاقة واربع أفراد من اسرته

• لا يسري هذا العرض بتزامن مع عروض اخرى لدى المطعم

• العروض لا يمكن تحويلها لأي طرف آخر أو إستبدالها نقدا.

• تخضع جميع العروض لضريبة القيمة المضافة وفقا لقانون دولة الإمارات العربية المتحدة

للحجز والإستعلام:

برغر بيت - لاست اكزت، شارع الشيخ زايد،

برغر بيت - لاست إكسيت ماد إكس

برغر بيت - لاست اكسيت القدره

برجر بيت - لاست اكزيت الخوانيج
ar.shortDescription: إبرز بطاقة فزعة الصالحة الخاصة بك واستمتع بخصم %20 على الفاتورة

ar.title: 20%  خصم

en.description:
Terms and conditions:





  • To avail the offer a Fazaa member must present with a valid Fazaa Card
  • Offer valid for 1 Fazaa member plus 4 accompanying persons
  • The offers are not valid in conjunction with any other deals or promotions
  • This offers are non-transferable and cannot be redeemed for cash

Location & Contact:

Last Exit Al Khawaneej

Burger Pit is a quintessentially classic American Airstream brought into the modern world. Drawing inspiration from the retro 1950’s, it combines old-fashioned values with Dubai’s ever-growing demand for good food, fast.

The motto is simple – good quality food done well. Classic beef burgers sit alongside new favourites like crispy fried buttermilk chicken (The Drifter) and The Original, while for the less decisive, there’s the option of having all of it in the aptly named ‘The Argentinian’ burger. As well as this, our gourmet food truck also boasts classic hot dogs in the shape of their ‘Home Dog’ – premium sausage in a soft bun with caramelised onions and American Mustard

And not forgetting your classic all-American shakes are there to wash it all down.

A first-of-its-kind concept in Dubai, Burger Pit will appeal to every demographic with its quality ingredients, accessibility, and superior flavour. The ultimate convenience food
en.shortDescription: Present your Fazaa Card to enjoy a 20% discount on the bill
